## PR checklist

- [ ] Fill in description of the PR and link to any relevant issues.
- [ ] If you've fixed a bug, added a subworkflow or any other code that should be tested, add tests!
- [ ] If you've added a new tool, update citations according to the instructions under [Adding Citations](https://github.com/Clinical-Genomics/oncorefiner/tree/dev?tab=contributing-ov-file#adding-citations).
- [ ] Usage Documentation in `docs/usage.md` is updated.
- [ ] Output Documentation in `docs/output.md` is updated.
- [ ] `README.md` is updated (including authors/contributors).

See [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/Clinical-Genomics/oncorefiner/tree/dev?tab=contributing-ov-file#readme) for more details on how to contribute according to pipeline conventions.
